title: Safeguarding Cleaner and Healthier Outcomes, ANAB Accredits Newly Launched CloroxPro HealthyClean ® Certificate Program - Trained Manager Course
text: NEW YORK , Oct. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- To help guide commercial cleaning managers with essential strategies and best practices needed to run efficient and sustainable health operations, the  ANSI National Accreditation Board  (ANAB), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the  American National Standards Institute , has accredited the CloroxPro HealthyClean ® Certificate Program – Trained Manager Course, in accordance with the American National Standard (ANS) ANSI/ASTM E2659-18 , Standard Practice for Certificate Programs. The course is now the second industry-wide certificate program designed for professional cleaners to earn ANAB accreditation, in addition to the CloroxPro HealthyClean ® Trained Specialist Certificate Course accredited by ANAB in 2022.
